focus_intent: Iteration 12: seraphim find-qbc CLI subcommand shipped (closes broadcast tech-debt item #1). find_qbc_triads function in memory_kernel.py + cli registration. Output includes ready-to-paste `seraphim audit` commands for each top-N QBC triad. Smoke test verified top-5 includes all 4 production-verified triads (rank-1 to rank-4). 3-phase production toolchain now CLI-native: find-qbc (discover) → audit --sim-only (gate) → audit (verify). Remaining open broadcast tech-debt: seraphim audit-pipeline orchestration / --resume-pair flag / zzfm-r2 sim-only enforcement. Budget 33.19s of 150s.
